tracks.rawText: 3:59Karen Díaz, venezolana, está conquistando las redes con su increíblev5.5CoverVirtuosic angelic harp with rapid glissandos, rolled chords, and delicate harmonics over a glassy synthetic pad bed, Airy choir layers, celesta accents, and a soft sub-bass pulse create a luminous, high-register texture, Spacious reverb and subtle delay widen the arrangement into a radiant, floating dreamPublishRemix
